message:
refactor: Add debug flags to control verbose logging

Add DEBUG_* constants to guard std.debug.print statements in:
- compile.zig (DEBUG_COMPILE)
- generator.zig (DEBUG_CODEGEN)
- generators.zig (DEBUG_CLASS_GEN)
- call_graph.zig (DEBUG_CALL_GRAPH)
- core.zig (DEBUG_CALL_GRAPH)
- imports.zig (DEBUG_IMPORTS)
- import_scanner.zig (DEBUG_IMPORT_SCAN)

This cleans up test output which was showing verbose phase logging.
All flags default to false. Set to true for debugging specific areas.
